scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,auth,frontend -c cyan,green,magenta "npm --prefix data-service run dev" "npm --prefix auth-service run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:railway: concurrently -n api,auth,frontend -c cyan,green,magenta "npm run dev:api:railway" "npm run dev:auth:railway" "npm run dev:frontend:railway"
scripts.dev:api:railway: railway run --service data-service --environment development npm --prefix data-service run dev
scripts.dev:auth:railway: railway run --service auth-service --environment development npm --prefix auth-service run dev
scripts.dev:dispatch:railway: railway run --service dispatch-service --environment development npm --prefix dispatch-service run dev
scripts.dev:frontend:railway: railway run --service frontend --environment development npm --prefix frontend run dev
scripts.railway:deploy:dev:all: npm run railway:deploy:dev:frontend && npm run railway:deploy:dev:data && npm run railway:deploy:dev:auth && npm run railway:deploy:dev:dispatch
